login.title: MiniNook
login.subtitle: Connect to your Miniflux server to get started.
login.switchToBasic: Local setup without OIDC? Use login + password
login.errorMissingUrl: Please enter the server URL first.

slides.title: Welcome to MiniNook
slides.desc: A clean RSS reader built on top of your Miniflux server. Here's what you can do in seconds.

slides.title: Discover and subscribe to feeds
slides.desc: “Discover” tab to add suggested feeds in one click. “My feeds” tab to refresh or delete the ones you already follow.

slides.title: Browse by category and filter
slides.desc: The category bar at the bottom filters by topic. At the top, two toggles: “🔒 paywall” to hide paid articles, “▦ dedup” to group cross-feed duplicates.

slides.title: React and clean up
slides.desc: ✓ Mark as read  •  ⭐ Read later  •  ✕ Not interested. Dismissed items land in “Discarded” and you can open the original from the article page.

slides.title: Keep your feeds relevant
slides.desc: On “Discarded”, a chart shows which feeds generate the most noise. Unsubscribe directly from this view to clean up your feed.

settings.title: Settings
settings.disconnectHint: You'll go back to the login screen.

feed.emptyNoFeedsHint: Start with a selection of suggested feeds.

article.paywallPartialPercent: The displayed content is partial ({percent}% available).

register.title: Suggestions
register.subtitle: A selection of feeds to add to your Miniflux in one click.

bookmarks.title: My list
bookmarks.empty: No articles in your reading list

dismissed.title: Discarded
dismissed.emptyHint: Articles marked “not interested” will appear here.
